summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WinDesk Cloud SaaS platform MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional (23/23 tests passed). Frontend UI loads correctly with some session management issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Users get logged out frequently when navigating between protected routes
Confirm password field validation not handled properly in test flow

integration_issues.issue: Session expires causing redirects to login page during navigation

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct branding and pricing cards
Admin login with admin@windesk.cloud / Admin123! works
Dashboard shows VMs and admin navigation for admin users
All 23 backend API endpoints function correctly
Admin panel APIs return proper data
Plans page displays all 3 plans correctly
Authentication system works via API calls
Order creation and payment simulation work
VM management features (restart, snapshot, metrics) work
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management issues - JWT tokens may be expiring too quickly or not being properly refreshed, causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation between protected routes
